creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: If you install emulators/linux_base-c6 using 'make install' files that are hardlinks to other files are not installed on the system.  An example is /compat/linux/sbin/fsck.ext2 but there are several others.  Pkg lists them all when you delete the package.  When you create a package using 'make package' and then install that package using 'pkg add' everything is fine.
